title: shorea macroptera subsp. sandakanensis
intro: Shorea macroptera subsp. sandakanensis, also known as the Sandakan stinkwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Shorea macroptera subsp. sandakanensis include the ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to promote overall health and well-being.
